usage.selection: Read this compact index first to shortlist period-specific nostalgia templates from metadata.
usage.previews: For title-slide previews, read only the preview_md files for shortlisted candidates.
usage.final_generation: After the user chooses a nostalgia template, read exactly that template design_md before generating the full deck.
usage.never: Do not bulk-read templates/*/design.md and do not read template.html unless a selected design.md is missing a critical implementation detail.

frontend_slides_policy.mobile_behavior: preserve 16:9 stage; letterbox or pillarbox instead of reflowing slide content
frontend_slides_policy.readability_floor: Authentic ugly is welcome; unreadable is not. Main body text >= 28px, captions >= 18px.

templates.name: Office 97 Title Slide
templates.tagline: Default PowerPoint title-and-bullets with navy titles, teal AutoShapes, Arial, and hard gray shadows.
templates.best_for: Talks that should feel like a hand-built PowerPoint from a school computer lab, office lunch-and-learn, family slideshow, or scrappy founder demo.
templates.avoid_for: Decks needing contemporary polish, luxury restraint, or invisible design.
templates.readability_notes: Keep the era-authentic look, but protect body readability with solid panels, sufficient contrast, and large type.

templates.name: PowerPoint Blue Daybreak
templates.tagline: Blue diagonal preset gradient, white text, harsh banding, and boxed content panels.
templates.best_for: Keynote-style nostalgia, school projects, tech-history decks, and any deck where blue gradient backgrounds are the joke and the charm.
templates.avoid_for: Dense reports or decks that cannot tolerate saturated backgrounds.
templates.readability_notes: Keep the era-authentic look, but protect body readability with solid panels, sufficient contrast, and large type.

templates.name: WordArt Rainbow Splash
templates.tagline: Rainbow arched WordArt, starburst badges, 3D extrusion shadows, and unapologetic slide-art chaos.
templates.best_for: Openers, section breaks, playful announcements, awards, retrospectives, and decks that want a big nostalgic grin.
templates.readability_notes: Keep the era-authentic look, but protect body readability with solid panels, sufficient contrast, and large type.

templates.name: Comic Sans Casual Deck
templates.tagline: Pale yellow slides, Comic Sans, speech bubbles, clip-art-ish symbols, and friendly chaos.
templates.best_for: Teaching, workshops, family decks, hobby talks, and anything intentionally non-corporate.
templates.avoid_for: Anything where Comic Sans would undermine user trust.
templates.readability_notes: Keep the era-authentic look, but protect body readability with solid panels, sufficient contrast, and large type.

templates.name: GeoCities Welcome Homepage
templates.tagline: Tiled star background, centered table, marquee welcome, visitor counter, and best-viewed badges.
templates.best_for: Personal intros, creator decks, retrospectives, web-history talks, and casual decks that should feel handmade online.
templates.avoid_for: Decks requiring restraint, neutrality, or quiet reading.
templates.readability_notes: Keep the era-authentic look, but protect body readability with solid panels, sufficient contrast, and large type.

templates.name: Under Construction Page
templates.tagline: Hazard stripes, blinking sign energy, shovel-man silhouette, and come-back-soon sincerity.
templates.best_for: Roadmap, in-progress ideas, TODO sections, prototypes, and humorous pause slides.
templates.avoid_for: Final executive messaging or anything that must feel complete.
templates.readability_notes: Keep the era-authentic look, but protect body readability with solid panels, sufficient contrast, and large type.

templates.name: FrontPage Table Web
templates.tagline: Visible table borders, beveled side navigation, default links, spacer-GIF geometry, and webmaster pride.
templates.best_for: Agendas, link/resource pages, comparative lists, docs-as-slides, and web project storytelling.
templates.readability_notes: Keep the era-authentic look, but protect body readability with solid panels, sufficient contrast, and large type.

templates.name: 88×31 Badge Wall
templates.tagline: Dense grid of tiny badges, awards, Netscape buttons, HTML pride, and ring navigation.
templates.best_for: Credits, collaborators, tool stacks, references, sponsor walls, and closing slides.
templates.avoid_for: Slides needing one focused idea only.
templates.readability_notes: Keep the era-authentic look, but protect body readability with solid panels, sufficient contrast, and large type.

templates.name: Bondi Aqua Boot
templates.tagline: Aqua pinstripes, gel buttons, candy progress bars, and translucent Bondi-blue optimism.
templates.best_for: Openers, product demos, playful tech talks, and early-2000s computer nostalgia.
templates.readability_notes: Keep the era-authentic look, but protect body readability with solid panels, sufficient contrast, and large type.

templates.name: Chrome Swoosh Hero
templates.tagline: Silver chrome ribbons, cyan glows, lens flares, italic tech headlines, and dotcom future hype.
templates.best_for: Vision slides, product reveals, tech nostalgia, and anything that should feel like a 2001 Flash intro.
templates.avoid_for: Warm personal storytelling or quiet reading.
templates.readability_notes: Keep the era-authentic look, but protect body readability with solid panels, sufficient contrast, and large type.

templates.name: Aero Sky Dashboard
templates.tagline: Sky-to-grass gradient, bubbles, glass panels, leaf-green accents, and cheerful dashboard optimism.
templates.best_for: Feature grids, roadmaps, product status, and early smart-device nostalgia.
templates.avoid_for: Anything needing gritty retro, old-web chaos, or monochrome discipline.
templates.readability_notes: Keep the era-authentic look, but protect body readability with solid panels, sufficient contrast, and large type.

templates.name: Brushed Metal Player
templates.tagline: Aluminum texture, recessed displays, gel transport buttons, and early media-app chrome.
templates.best_for: Media showcases, demos, product walkthroughs, timelines, and decks about creative tools.
templates.avoid_for: Playful kid/classroom slides or loud old-web humor.
templates.readability_notes: Keep the era-authentic look, but protect body readability with solid panels, sufficient contrast, and large type.

templates.name: System 7 Desktop
templates.tagline: Stippled desktop, Chicago-like menus, black 1px windows, dithered gray chrome, and zero blur.
templates.best_for: Software history, product specs, changelogs, workshops, and interface-centered decks.
templates.avoid_for: Glossy Y2K, corporate PowerPoint, or high-drama visuals.
templates.readability_notes: Keep the era-authentic look, but protect body readability with solid panels, sufficient contrast, and large type.

templates.name: Kid Pix Canvas
templates.tagline: Tool palettes, stamp grids, paint-bucket colors, wacky brush marks, and cheerful pixel mess.
templates.best_for: Creative workshops, teaching, brainstorming, personal decks, and anything about making things by hand.
templates.avoid_for: High-stakes professional updates or restrained typography work.
templates.readability_notes: Keep the era-authentic look, but protect body readability with solid panels, sufficient contrast, and large type.

templates.name: About This Macintosh
templates.tagline: System info dialog boxes, memory bars, tiny icons, version rows, and satisfying monochrome order.
templates.best_for: Specs, architecture summaries, status reports, changelogs, and compact technical explanations with personality.
templates.avoid_for: Cinematic one-line slides or loud celebratory moments.
templates.readability_notes: Keep the era-authentic look, but protect body readability with solid panels, sufficient contrast, and large type.

templates.name: Memphis Confetti Card
templates.tagline: Primary shapes, squiggles, terrazzo dots, worksheet panels, and handmade desktop-publishing joy.
templates.best_for: Section openers, creative prompts, workshop slides, and casual explainers needing color without business polish.
templates.avoid_for: Authentic grayscale Mac UI or dark old-web pages.
templates.readability_notes: Keep the era-authentic look, but protect body readability with solid panels, sufficient contrast, and large type.

templates.name: Southeast Asian Hawker Stall Signage
templates.tagline: Backlit lightbox panels, bilingual bold lettering, numbered price grids, halal/established badges, and tarpaulin-banner street-food signage.
templates.best_for: Food, culture, travel, community talks, informal explainers, local commerce stories, menus-as-slides, and high-energy workshop decks needing loud vernacular graphic design.
templates.avoid_for: Minimal luxury decks, quiet editorial storytelling, dark technical diagrams, or material where food-market vernacular would feel culturally off-topic.
templates.readability_notes: Keep the era-authentic look, but protect body readability with solid framed panels, white/black outlined text on saturated grounds, and large type.
